pendulum.context: In many rural Zambian schools, understanding the physics behind a pendulum helps explain the swing of a traditional maize pounder (Mtondo) or playground swings made from old tires.

circuit.context: Zambia frequently faces load-shedding. Understanding circuits helps students learn how to safely wire a solar panel to a battery for lighting homes during power outages.

diffusion.context: When storing harvested maize with traditional herbs to prevent weevils, the smell spreads throughout the storage bin. This is an everyday example of diffusion.

water_purify.context: During the rainy season, ensuring clean drinking water is vital to prevent cholera. Water purification using local sand, gravel, and charcoal filters is a crucial real-world application.

combustion.context: Using a traditional brazier (Mbaula) shows how air is needed to keep the charcoal burning brightly. Regulating the air flow changes how fast the charcoal burns.
